# GitHub Labels Map

Use these labels for issue/PR triage.

| Label | Color | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `type:bug` | `d73a4a` | Defects, regressions, runtime failures |
| `type:feature` | `0e8a16` | New functionality |
| `type:docs` | `1d76db` | Docs/readme/deploy notes updates |
| `type:ops` | `5319e7` | Deployment/infra/monitoring/firewall |
| `area:portal` | `fbca04` | Captive portal UI/backend |
| `area:radius` | `b60205` | FreeRADIUS/auth/accounting logic |
| `area:mysql` | `006b75` | Schema/data/migrations |
| `area:daloradius` | `c2e0c6` | daloRADIUS panel/config/runtime |
| `area:omada` | `0052cc` | Omada controller/AP integration |
| `prio:P0` | `b60205` | Critical outage / security / production blocker |
| `prio:P1` | `d93f0b` | High priority |
| `prio:P2` | `fbca04` | Medium priority |
| `prio:P3` | `0e8a16` | Low priority / backlog |
| `status:blocked` | `000000` | External dependency blocker |
| `status:ready` | `0e8a16` | Ready for implementation |
| `status:needs-info` | `ededed` | Missing info from reporter |
